assessment_boundary: This bundle may record an internally closed candidate only after all five criteria and their content-addressed evidence pass. It never asserts public theorem closure, production security, FIPS validation, or completion of independent cryptographic review.

blockers: capture_present_and_valid
capture_schema_valid
validation_ready
exact_24_case_campaign
evidence_bundle_bound
strong_profile_executed
threshold_authorization_verified
deterministic_validator_revalidation

criterion substantive/profile/review semantics are invalid
criterion-specific substantive checks are incomplete
